prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年（理科）最低位次约969名，2023年（理科）大幅后移至1583名，2024年（理科）回升至842名，2025年（物理类）约954名；近四年位次波动较大，2025年 基准位次约954名，较2024年略有后移；该校在宁夏物理类（含原理科）招生计划：2022年33人→2023年27人→2024年25人→2025年31人→2026年25人；2 026年较2025年缩招6人（约19.4%），缩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解，位次数字趋于减小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国 大学排名近年分别为2021年第14位、2022年第11位、2023年第12位、2024年第15位、2025年第15位、2026年第16位，稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期内 四川大学声誉评价为「明显负面」，事件总数51件（正面1、负面46），主要涉及教师学术不端与师德失范举报等舆情，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制作用，使位次数字 略有增大。抖音热度排名第35位，评价「较热」，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上。历史投档异常记录中，2022年曾出现投档线大幅下降信号；四川大学拥有口腔医 学A+、中国语言文学A+、护理学A+、临床医学A、化学A、数学A、生物学A、药学A、软件工程A、轻工技术与工程A、马克思主义理论A等19个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对高分 考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类专业热度2024年较2023年明显降温，但电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化仍为高热推荐；口腔医学、临床医学持续偏热。宁 夏2026年高考总报名人数约66000人，较2025年（约65897人）基本持平；物理类估算约44550人，与2025年物理类44491人相近，考生规模稳定。；四川大学位于成都市，与宁夏同属西部地区，地域偏好上对宁夏考生有一定吸引力；该校在宁夏招生计划占比较小（约25-33人/年），属跨省招生常规规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年招生计划缩招约19.4%（使位次数字减小）、声誉负面舆情（使位次数字增大）以及考生总数基本稳定等因素，缩招的缓解效应与 声誉的抑制效应相互抵消后，预计2026年物理类最低位次约863名，较2025年954名略有前移（更易进）；区间765-961名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间765-961名内，建议以二档专业（电气类、计算机类）为主攻方向，一档（口腔医学、临床医学）需位次明显优于区间下限方可冲刺，三档专业可作为保底选择。 口腔医学为川大王牌A+学科，竞争极为激烈，需位次在500名以内方有较大把握。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022 (Science), the lowest ranking was approximately 969; in 2023 (Science), it significantly shifted back to 1583; in 2024 (Science), it rebounded to 842; in 2025 (Physics Category), it was about 954. Rankings have fluctuated considerably over the past four years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 954, slightly shifted back compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia's Physics Category (including former Science) was: 2022: 33 → 2023: 27 → 2024: 25 → 2025: 31 → 2026: 25. In 2026, enrollment decreased by 6 students (approximately 19.4%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly and causing the ranking number to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 14th in 2021, 11th in 2022, 12th in 2023, 15th in 2024, 15th in 2025, and 16th in 2026, consistently among the top universities nationwide. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Sichuan University's reputation evaluation was 'significantly negative,' with a total of 51 incidents (1 positive, 46 negative), mainly involving reports of academic misconduct and teacher ethics violations, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply, causing the ranking number to increase slightly. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 35th, evaluated as 'relatively hot,' with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms. Historical admission anomalies include a significant drop in the admission line in 2022. Sichuan University has 19 A- or above disciplines, including Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Chemistry A, Mathematics A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A, and Marxist Theory A, with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of computer-related majors significantly cooled in 2024 compared to 2023, but Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly recommended. Stomatology and Clinical Medicine continue to be relatively hot. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Ningxia is approximately 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (about 65,897). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 44,550, similar to 2025's 44,491, indicating a stable candidate pool. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, which, like Ningxia, is in the western region, giving it some regional appeal to Ningxia candidates. Its enrollment plan in Ningxia is relatively small (about 25-33 students per year), a typical scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 19.4% (causing the ranking number to decrease), negative reputation incidents (causing the ranking number to increase), and the stable total number of candidates, the easing effect of the enrollment reduction and the suppressing effect of the reputation roughly offset each other. It is predicted that the lowest ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will be about 863, slightly shifted forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025's 954. The range is 765-961.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (including Dual Bachelor's Degree)
- Electrical Engineering
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Polymer Materials and Engineering
- Aerospace Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With a ranking within the predicted range of 765-961, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science) as the main direction. For Tier 1 (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine), a ranking significantly better than the lower limit of the range is needed to attempt. Tier 3 majors can be used as safety choices. Stomatology is Sichuan University's flagship A+ discipline, with extremely intense competition; a ranking within 500 is required for a high chance of admission.

In 2023 (Liberal Arts), the lowest rank was approximately 228; in 2024 (Liberal Arts), approximately 264; in 2025 (History Category), approximately 283; over the past three years, the rank has shifted backward, with a cumulative shift of about 55 places, and the baseline rank for 2025 is approximately 283.

[Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for History Category (including former Liberal Arts): 2023: 6 people → 2024: 8 people → 2025: 11 people → 2026: 9 people; in 2026, compared to 2025, there is a reduction of 2 people (about 18.2%), a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly, leading to a decrease in rank numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks steadily among the top 20 nationally in the Soft Science Ranking, ranking 16th in 2026, with strong comprehensive strength; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Sichuan University's reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly involving teacher ethics and academic misconduct public opinion, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply, causing rank numbers to increase slightly. Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; advantageous disciplines related to History Category include Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A, Law A-, Archaeology A-, etc., with profound humanities and social sciences foundation, attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese major was evaluated as 'Recommended' (slightly hot) in 2024, Law as 'Divergence and Wait-and-See', and Journalism and Communication as 'Clearly Discouraged'. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance examination is about 66,000, with History Category estimated at about 21,450, basically unchanged from 2025's 21,406. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, which is in the same western region as Ningxia, and regional proximity has a certain appeal to Ningxia candidates; the enrollment plan for History Category is small (about 6-11 people per year), with a small competition base, making rank fluctuations relatively sensitive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of rank shifting backward over the past three years, the reduction in enrollment by about 18.2% in 2026 (causing rank numbers to decrease), and the negative reputation public opinion (causing rank numbers to increase), the reduction effect slightly dominates. It is expected that the lowest rank for History Category in 2026 will be about 267, slightly forward compared to 2025's 283 (easier to enter); the range is 237-297.
